steps: Contact RBC Investor Services to report overpayment of CAD 4,077.00 on BMO dividend due to incorrect tax withholding (13.5% vs treaty rate of 15%)
Request RBC arrange return of excess CAD 4,077.00 to Canadian Revenue Agency as the custodian under-withheld tax contrary to CA-NO treaty provisions
Provide CRA Part XIII tax rates documentation showing 15% treaty rate applies to Norwegian resident CLIENT08
Follow up with RBC within 10 business days to ensure proper remittance of excess amount to CRA

references.title: CRA – Rates for Part XIII Tax (WHT rates & treaty reduction)
